channel.title: Posts on Random R Chunks
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Random R Chunks

item.title: Grouped stacked barplots with nested x axis in highcharter
item.description: library(highcharter) ## Registered S3 method overwritten by 'quantmod': ## method from ## as.zoo.data.frame zoo ## Highcharts (www.highcharts.com) is a Highsoft software product which is ## not free for commercial and Governmental use hello sessionInfo() ## R version 4.0.0 (2020-04-24) ## Platform: x86_64-w64-mingw32/x64 (64-bit) ## Running under: Windows 10 x64 (build 18362) ## ## Matrix products: default ## ## locale: ## [1] LC_COLLATE=English_Belgium.1252 LC_CTYPE=English_Belgium.1252 ## [3] LC_MONETARY=English_Belgium.1252 LC_NUMERIC=C ## [5] LC_TIME=English_Belgium.
